parameters.query: SELECT p.id, p.name as project_name, p.project_type, p.budget_target, p.budget_flexible, p.location_city, p.location_province, p.property_type, p.property_area_m2, p.urgency, c.name as client_name, c.email as client_email FROM projects p JOIN clients c ON c.id = p.client_id WHERE p.id = $1::uuid
SELECT id, version, summary, client_needs, objectives, constraints, style_preferences, rooms_affected FROM briefings WHERE project_id = $1::uuid AND status = 'approved' ORDER BY version DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT content, model_recommended, temperature FROM agent_prompts WHERE agent_name = 'agent_design' AND prompt_type = 'system' AND is_active = true LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO design_options (project_id, option_number, title, description, intervention_logic, rooms_layout, technical_notes, conflict_points, pros, cons, estimated_complexity) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::int, $3, $4, $5, $6::jsonb, $7::jsonb, $8::jsonb, $9::jsonb, $10::jsonb, $11) RETURNING id, option_number, title

INSERT INTO approvals (project_id, approval_type, requested_by, summary, details, related_entity, expires_at) VALUES ($1::uuid, 'design_review', 'agent_design', $2, $3::jsonb, 'design_options', NOW() + INTERVAL '72 hours') RETURNING id

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.project_id, 'Seleccion de opcion de distribucion para ' + $json.project_name, JSON.stringify({project_name: $json.project_name, option_count: $json.option_count})] }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO activity_log (project_id, agent_name, action, phase_at_time, output_summary, status) VALUES ($1::uuid, 'agent_design', 'options_sent_for_selection', 'briefing_done', $2, 'success')

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Build Selection Email').first().json.project_id, $('Build Selection Email').first().json.option_count + ' opciones de distribucion enviadas al arquitecto'] }}

parameters.query: UPDATE design_options SET is_selected = true, selected_at = NOW() WHERE project_id = $1::uuid AND option_number = $2::int
UPDATE approvals SET status = 'approved', decided_by = 'architect', decided_at = NOW() WHERE id = $1::uuid
